description: In the form of a legal document (see lines 3-4), a fragment of a petition to a Nagid from a small town, signed by twenty-six persons in different hands, of whom seven were opposed and three were out of town. (Information from Mediterranean Society, II, p. 62; V, p. 118)
description_he: בצורת מסמך משפטי, קטע עצומה לנגיד מעיירה קטנה, חתום על ידי 26 אנשים בכתבי יד שונים, שבעה נגדה ושלושה היו מחוץ לעיר.
